query: SELECT id, nomeCompleto, cpfCnpj, status FROM clientes WHERE nomeCompleto LIKE '%vanderson%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%natalicio%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%maria julia%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%osmair%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%irene%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%teonila%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%maeve%' OR nomeCompleto LIKE '%ariel%' ORDER BY nomeCompleto;
